issues.problem: The hero image bleeds on three edges (top, right, and bottom). The style guide states: 'Images bleed to page edge on at most one side.'
issues.fix: Recess the hero image so it respects the top and bottom margins, bleeding only on the right edge.

issues.problem: The CTA text ('Book a cupping — hello@strangeloop.coffee') is set in deep teal, but the style guide specifies Copper (#C1673C) for the CTA.
issues.fix: Change the CTA text color to Copper (#C1673C) to comply with the brand palette guidelines.

notes: The layout is otherwise beautiful, well-spaced, and highly professional with excellent typographic hierarchy and adherence to the content brief.
